{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220424379956AA497C3D3C4BE385"}"},"total":11966},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7117022043237073703","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文文写的很好天天追，作者很努力，这是我叫见过番茄最厉害的作者了，日日五更，准点准时，说实话整个番茄所有年代文里生产队的驴都没作者能干[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657060959,"group_id":"7111200276232539166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5xHincOOR/Sqiim3niLtbMoJNZ0B5Z26wHKmMf6ErEE","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"3730000737215032","user_name":"蓝凌小飞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3730000737215032","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7111200276232539166","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间+囤物资）
　　天灾骤降，世界巨变，先是极热，再是极寒，紧接着地震，大雾，永夜，酸雨接踵而至。
　　孤身在末世挣扎求生十年的苏念，最后还是死在了倾盆而下的酸雨中。
　　再次睁眼，苏念发现自己重生了，此时距离末世还有三个月。
　　当在传家宝里发现一个巨大的随身空间后，苏念给自己定下了重生后的第一个小目标——花光21个亿，用物资把空间填满！
　　从此，苏念开始了囤货模式。
　　米面粮油？买！
　　鸡鸭鱼肉？买！
　　衣帽鞋袜？买！
　　肉脯凤爪小火锅，薯片辣条螺蛳粉，一个都不能少！
　　（天灾末世求生文，男主绝对出乎预料！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/696e6c1a718671ea0968fa5e8ded968b","author":"袅袅鱼音","author_id":"","book_id":"7111200276232539166","book_name":"天灾末世囤货忙，邻居囤枪我囤粮","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7111201958790332940","read_count":"44162","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1033342"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"508","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,天灾,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b74f59e2130811ca6a5ec25d6b42d30e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308677&x-signature=Ulm%2BCKVMfKnQX5%2FR5QrQFDzgz6Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"421827749347720","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1756903e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220424379956AA497C3D3C4BE385"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":152,"forwarded_count"
